title: mo:os Superset Ontology v3
description: Complete categorical ontology for the mo:os Universal Graph Model. Single source of truth for axioms, kinds, morphisms, categories, and functors. Contingent instances live in ../instances/.

formalization_levels.L3: Fully modeled — objects, morphisms, composition, identity all explicit
formalization_levels.L2: Partially modeled — objects named, some morphisms described, composition implicit
formalization_levels.L1: Named only — appears in functor signatures or prose, no internal structure
formalization_levels.L0: External — standard mathematical category inherited from mathematics

axioms.name: No_Meta_Only_Recursive
axioms.statement: Every entity is a container identified by URN. No metadata layer — only containers referencing containers via wires.

axioms.name: Code_Is_Axiomatic
axioms.statement: Code loaded as atomic morphisms into semantic folders. Code never stored in state_payload. Binding code to metadata = structural binding loss.

axioms.name: DB_Is_Truth
axioms.statement: morphism_log is single source of truth. containers and wires tables are materialized caches. State reconstructible by replay.

axioms.name: Hypergraph_Superposition
axioms.statement: DB stores THE graph — superposition of all projected graphs. Multiple wires between same (A,B) via different ports. UNIQUE on 4-tuple. Query collapses superposition.
axioms.formal: G_stored = ⋃_{p ∈ Ports} G_p; UNIQUE(source_urn, source_port, target_urn, target_port)

axioms.name: Discovery_Retrieval_Duality
axioms.statement: Gap between n²×|P_s|×|P_t| potential edges and k actual edges IS knowledge. D/R ratio per sub-category is first-class optimization metric.
axioms.formal: Knowledge = n²×|P_s|×|P_t| - k; D/R = Cost_discovery / Cost_retrieval

core.name: Coslice(A)
core.objects: Outgoing morphisms from A (f_i: A → B_i)

core.name: Slice(A)
core.objects: Incoming morphisms to A (g_i: B_i → A)

core.name: Scoped(W)
core.morphisms: Inherited from C — all wires between scoped objects

core.name: Kernel
core.morphisms: = C morphisms (CompletionResult received from any provider)

stratum_chain.name: C_0
stratum_chain.objects: Authored declarations and references prior to validation
stratum_chain.gap: Inclusion functor ι_0 stated but composition verification not shown

stratum_chain.name: C_1
stratum_chain.objects: C_0 ∪ validated artifacts admitted for realization
stratum_chain.gap: Inclusion functor ι_1 stated but not verified full and faithful

stratum_chain.name: C_2
stratum_chain.objects: C_1 ∪ materialized graph-ready programs and structures

stratum_chain.name: C_3
stratum_chain.morphisms: Execution and replay-preserving relations over S0..S3 objects
stratum_chain.gap: Inclusion functor ι_3 stated but contingent-state boundaries need fuller proof

stratum_chain.name: C_4
stratum_chain.objects: C_3 ∪ projected views and surface bindings
stratum_chain.gap: Projection inclusion is named but view-coherence proofs remain partial

hydration_pipeline.name: Authored
hydration_pipeline.gap: Blind box — carries functor V domain but no internal structure defined

hydration_pipeline.name: Validated
hydration_pipeline.gap: Blind box — carries functor M domain but no internal structure defined

hydration_pipeline.name: Materialized
hydration_pipeline.gap: Blind box — carries functor E domain but no internal structure defined

hydration_pipeline.name: Projected
hydration_pipeline.objects: Projected views in the Lens_i family: UI projections, embeddings, metrics
hydration_pipeline.gap: Blind box — carries functor P_i codomain but no internal structure defined

hydration_pipeline.name: Evaluated
hydration_pipeline.objects: Contingent graph state after execution, hydration, or replay
hydration_pipeline.gap: Blind box — execution outputs are named, but internal categorical structure is not yet defined

functor_codomains.name: Manifest
functor_codomains.gap: Functor F_fs domain — no categorical structure defined

functor_codomains.name: React
functor_codomains.gap: Functor F_ui codomain — no categorical structure defined

functor_codomains.name: DAG
functor_codomains.gap: Functor F_struct codomain — no categorical structure defined

cross_provider.name: Provider_p
cross_provider.objects: Model containers owned by provider (e.g. claude-3-7-sonnet, gemini-2.0-flash, gpt-4o)
cross_provider.morphisms: can_execute wires, tool invocations, Complete/Stream operations
cross_provider.gap: Composition of provider morphisms not formally verified

cross_provider.name: Standard
cross_provider.objects: Scored results, capability profiles, cost metrics
cross_provider.morphisms: Score composition, profile ordering, cost composition
cross_provider.gap: Objects described in prose, morphisms have no formal definition. Every provider benchmark functor lands here but cannot verify structure preservation.

cross_provider.name: Adapter
cross_provider.gap: Composition of Complete/Stream not explicitly defined as morphism composition

broad_category_subcategories.name: identity
broad_category_subcategories.description: Identity objects — actors that source OWNS and CAN_HYDRATE morphisms

broad_category_subcategories.name: structure
broad_category_subcategories.description: Structural objects — composable graph building blocks

broad_category_subcategories.name: compute
broad_category_subcategories.description: Compute objects — schedulable and executable resources

broad_category_subcategories.name: surface
broad_category_subcategories.description: Surface objects — rendering and execution endpoints

broad_category_subcategories.name: memory
broad_category_subcategories.description: Memory objects — ephemeral or persistent knowledge containers

broad_category_subcategories.name: evaluation
broad_category_subcategories.description: Evaluation objects — benchmark scores, capability profiles, cost metrics. Instances of C_standard. New in v3.
broad_category_subcategories.gap: No objects yet — populated when C_standard is promoted to L2+

objects.name: User
objects.description: Authenticated actor — container whose morphisms grant owned-workspace access edges. No special ontological status.

objects.name: ColliderAdmin
objects.description: Category administrator — elevated actor with governed OWNS edges to assigned containers.

objects.name: SuperAdmin
objects.description: Root administrator — transitive OWNS over all containers.

objects.name: AppTemplate
objects.description: Template container — reusable subgraph pattern. Instantiation = ADD + LINK sequence.

objects.name: NodeContainer
objects.description: General-purpose container — default object in C. Payload in state_payload JSONB.

objects.name: AgnosticModel
objects.description: LLM/ML model container — provider-agnostic URN. Provider config in state_payload.

objects.name: SystemTool
objects.description: Tool container — discovered via graph traversal, exposed via MCP protocol surface.

objects.name: UI_Lens
objects.description: UI rendering surface — functor output: containers × wires → React component tree.

objects.name: RuntimeSurface
objects.description: Execution surface — HTTP/WS/MCP endpoint. Tools wire here to become executable.

objects.name: ComputeResource
objects.description: GPU device, Docker container, thread pool, VM — schedulable resource container.

objects.name: ProtocolAdapter
objects.description: WS channel, MCP session, gRPC stream, HTTP endpoint — routable communication container.

objects.name: InfraService
objects.description: Postgres instance, disk volume, network segment — persistable infrastructure container.

objects.name: MemoryStore
objects.description: Vector embedding store, context window, conversation history — ephemeral or persistent memory container.

morphisms.name: OWNS
morphisms.description: Ownership edge — automatic transitive propagation.

morphisms.name: CAN_HYDRATE
morphisms.description: Hydration permission — declared transitivity controlled by manifest/wire_config.

morphisms.name: PRE_FLIGHT_CONFIG
morphisms.description: Runtime configuration — sets initial state before activation.

morphisms.name: SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE
morphisms.description: State synchronization — surface pushes current state to container.

morphisms.name: ADD_NODE_CONTAINER
morphisms.description: Create + wire container into ownership tree.

morphisms.name: LINK_NODES
morphisms.description: General-purpose wiring — creates edge with specified port types.

morphisms.name: UPDATE_NODE_KERNEL
morphisms.description: Kernel-level state update.

morphisms.name: UNLINK_EDGE
morphisms.description: Remove wire. Container persists. May create orphan nodes. (Renamed from DELETE_EDGE in v2 to align with §3 canonical NT name.)

morphisms.name: CAN_SCHEDULE
morphisms.description: Workload allocation — kernel/admin schedules work to compute resource.

morphisms.name: CAN_ROUTE
morphisms.description: Transport selection — protocol adapter routes traffic.

morphisms.name: CAN_PERSIST
morphisms.description: Storage routing — container persists state through infra.

morphisms.name: CAN_FEDERATE
morphisms.description: Cross-instance communication — morphism bundle exchange between mo:os instances.

morphisms.name: CAN_FORK
morphisms.mock_purpose: Validate parallel DAG scoring architecture on GPU VRAM
morphisms.description: Branch parallel exploration — fork active state graph into GPU VRAM for parallel DAG scoring.

morphisms.name: SCORED_ON
morphisms.description: Model achieved this benchmark score. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

morphisms.name: EVALUATES_TASK
morphisms.description: Score applies to this task definition. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

morphisms.name: BENCHMARKED_BY
morphisms.description: Score belongs to this benchmark suite. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

invariant_morphisms.note: All 16 superset morphisms above decompose into these 4 invariant natural transformations (§3).

morphisms.name: ADD
morphisms.description: Create container — URN enters Ob(C)

morphisms.name: LINK
morphisms.description: Create wire — edge enters Hom(C)

morphisms.name: MUTATE
morphisms.description: Update container state — endomorphism

morphisms.name: UNLINK
morphisms.description: Remove wire — edge leaves Hom(C)

functors.name: FileSystem
functors.description: Import functor — reads manifest.yaml and creates/reconciles LINK morphisms.

functors.name: UI_Lens
functors.description: Render functor — maps containers and wires to XYFlow component tree.

functors.name: Embedding
functors.description: Embed functor — maps container payloads to pgvector embeddings.

functors.name: Structure
functors.description: GPU pre-analysis functor — adjacency matrix ops, spectral analysis, DAG compression.

functors.name: Benchmark
functors.description: Cross-provider comparison functor — structure-preserving map from provider categories to standard evaluation category.

systems.name: RootContainer
systems.description: Top-level container — root of all ownership trees.

systems.name: MainLoop
systems.description: Kernel event loop — Event→Route→Dispatch→Transform→Commit. No business logic.

systems.name: RestingStateDB
systems.description: Postgres ground truth — morphism_log (truth), containers/wires (caches), container_embeddings (functor output).

systems.name: ActiveStateGraph
systems.description: Live hypergraph superposition — queries collapse by port type selection.

paper_structures.name: H
paper_structures.vsa_model: BSC (Binary Spatter Codes); alternatives: MAP, HRR, FHRR
paper_structures.status: Theory complete, schema deployed (embeddings table), zero Go runtime — Wave 5 target
paper_structures.codomain_note: GPU residence is implementation detail of codomain, not categorical property

changes_from_v2: MOR08 renamed: DELETE_EDGE → UNLINK_EDGE (align with §3 canonical NT)
MOR14–MOR16 added: SCORED_ON, EVALUATES_TASK, BENCHMARKED_BY (§9 cross-provider)
MOR13 CAN_FORK: added mock_purpose and mock_review_by (§18 compliance)
categories section: added full §21 registry (19 CAT entries + 8 SUB entries)
SUB08 evaluation: new broad_category for benchmark result objects
formalization_levels: added to all category entries
realized_by: added to all category entries (wave linkage)
gap annotations: added to L1/L2 categories identifying what's missing
functor domain/codomain: now reference CAT IDs for traceability
references section: links back to §21, §9, §14, §12, waves, datasets
